strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, and React across multiple senior roles
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and public teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
No Vitest mentioned; testing background leans toward Selenium and D-language tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
response.justification: The role demands a 6+ year full-stack engineer fluent in TypeScript, Node.js, React, with AI-agent exposure and secondary Kotlin/Java — the candidate clears the seniority bar with ~15 years of experience, demonstrates the exact TS/Node/React stack at Optilyz and re:cinq, and uniquely matches the AI-agent requirement via current MCP and agentic framework work at re:cinq. Database (MongoDB), cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective), and Git are all evidenced. Gaps are framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js or Vitest) and Kotlin is absent, but these are learnable for a craftsman with proven polyglot range (TS, D, Java, C/C++, Swift, PHP) and a documented TDD culture. The CS degree and teaching record (workshops, dojos, Selenium course) further reinforce fit.
